All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractCommand
Base class for commands with common argument validation.
AddCommand
Adds a new element to the collection.
AddIfMinCommand
Adds element only if it is less than current minimum.
AstartesCategory
Category of a space marine.
Chapter
Chapter information for a space marine.
ClearCommand
Clears the collection.
CollectionManager
Manages in-memory collection of SpaceMarine objects.
Command
Command contract for interactive command processing.
CommandException
Signals command parsing or execution failure.
CommandLineParser
Parses raw command line input into command name and optional argument.
CommandLineParser.ParsedCommand
Parsed command line container.
CommandManager
Registers and executes commands by user input.
Coordinates
Coordinates of a space marine.
CountLessThanWeaponTypeCommand
Counts elements with weaponType less than provided value.
EnumUtils
Utility methods for enum parsing and formatting.
ExecuteScriptCommand
Starts execution of commands from the specified script file.
ExitCommand
Terminates command processing without automatic save.
FileManager
Handles loading and saving collection data in JSON format.
FileOperationException
Signals file read/write problems for collection persistence.
FilterByWeaponTypeCommand
Prints elements with the specified weapon type.
HelpCommand
Prints available commands and their descriptions.
HistoryCommand
Prints the last executed command names.
HistoryManager
Stores the last executed command names.
InfoCommand
Prints collection metadata.
InputException
Signals input source problems while reading command or field values.
InputManager
Manages command/field input from console and script files.
Main
Entry point for Lab5 collection manager application.
MeleeWeapon
Melee weapon type.
PrintUniqueCategoryCommand
Prints unique category values in the collection.
RemoveByIdCommand
Removes an element from collection by id.
SaveCommand
Saves collection to JSON file.
ShowCommand
Prints all collection elements.
ShuffleCommand
Randomly shuffles collection elements.
SimpleJson
Minimal JSON parser and serializer for primitive JSON structures.
SpaceMarine
Domain object managed by the collection.
SpaceMarineInputReader
Reads and validates composite SpaceMarine input from current input source.
UpdateCommand
Updates an existing collection element by id.
ValidationException
Signals invalid data in the domain model or user input.
Validators
Utility class with validation helpers for domain constraints.
Weapon
Primary weapon type.
